summary: Classified #49517 as the surviving canonical issue for the broad /new versus /reset contract. #49918 and linked PR #49945 are related TUI hook-observability work, not duplicates of #49517; they should remain open because #49918 has a distinct regression and #49945 is unmerged with unresolved review blockers and no reported checks.
